PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CONTRERAS, SALOMON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FRANKWELL INVESTMENT SERVICES, INC. $10,229.43 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,229.43, ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR- PLAINTIFF TO RECOVER INTEREST ON THE PRINCIPAL AT LEGAL RATE FROM 01-MAR-93, PLUS COSTS OF SUIT.
